name: Joe Biden
subject: Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I need your input. Please take my survey today and share your thoughts on the Supreme Court: |
---
Peter,

During our final Democratic Primary Debate, I promised the American people that if elected, I will nominate an African-American woman to the Supreme Court.

It's time to shatter this glass ceiling, and make the court more representative of the nation that they serve.

[Peter, the future of the Supreme Court is on the line in 2020. I would really appreciate having your thoughts on the court and its future. Can you take our quick Supreme Court survey today?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2b81/18894037/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/supreme-court-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners") | | **Supreme Court Survey**

**Supporter:** Peter Willis
**Survey Completed?** Not yet!

[Click here to begin the survey >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2b81/18894037/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/supreme-court-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners")

| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2b81/18894037/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/supreme-court-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners")
---
Look, I take Supreme Court nominations very seriously.

That's why in 1987 when I was the chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I recommended that the Senate reject Robert Bork's nomination to the Supreme Court. Bork's interpretation of our Constitution was downright dangerous, and I'm proud that I did my part to keep him off the Supreme Court.

Now, Donald Trump's Administration has filled our judiciary system with far-right ideologues from the Supreme Court on down, making the stakes of this election that much greater.

**So Peter, I need your input. Please take my survey today and share your thoughts on the Supreme Court:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/supreme-court-survey](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2b81/18894037/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/supreme-court-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.03.21_B2_scotus_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners")

Thank you,

_Joe Biden_

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2b80/18894037/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287f/18894037/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287e/18894037/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287d/18894037/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287c/18894037/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287b/18894037/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287a/18894037/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2879/18894037/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2878/18894037/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2877/18894037/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c287a/18894037/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2876/18894037/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2879/18894037/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf41/1cd0ac28/8a70804c/357c2875/18894037/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

These are trying times.

**But I learned from my mentor, Congressman John Lewis, that when we band together we can push the wheel of history toward progress.**

And I learned in 2017, when I ran for Congress, that we can build a grassroots army to rival the power of the corrupt machine.

I believe we are all called to stand up to the abuse of power.

Real talk -- here's what at stake:

Corruption threatens our republic.
* When 9 out of 10 Americans support universal background checks but Congress refuses because they're bought by the NRA -- **that 's corruption.**

* When Congress won't crack down on price gouging by drug companies, and guts protections for pre-existing conditions, because they're bought by insurance and pharmaceutical industries -- **that's corruption.**

* When the federal government silences its own environmental scientists because science threatens the fossil fuel industry -- **that's corruption.**

* When dark money from secret donors and powerful industries floods our airwaves with vicious propaganda -- **that's corruption.**

Let's fight back together. The time has come to launch an all-out attack on corruption in America.

[**I 'm REFUSING corporate PAC donations. That means I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to power us to victory. Look, I don't want to be bleak -- but 2020 may be our last chance...
* Our last chance to deliver health care for every American.

* Our last chance to save this planet.

* Our last chance to save our democracy.

Our government has squandered trillions on war, trillions on bailouts for failed banks, trillions on tax cuts for rich political donors.

_And then we're told there 's nothing left over for the people._

Why? Because our system is rotten.

But here's the good news. We still live in a democracy. We are citizens! We have the power to shape history.

clean_body: - | I can't stand what's happening to America. It's not just this obscene President. It's deeper than that. It's the corruption, greed, and cruelty that have become commonplace. Our republic is at risk. The planet is at risk. But we can fight back. And we must fight back. = "" = "" | = "" These are trying times. But I learned from my mentor, Congressman John Lewis, that when we band together we can push the wheel of history toward progress. And I learned in 2017, when I ran for Congress, that we can build a grassroots army to rival the power of the corrupt machine. I believe we are all called to stand up to the abuse of power. Real talk -- here's what at stake: Corruption threatens our republic. When 9 out of 10 Americans support universal background checks but Congress refuses because they're bought by the NRA -- that 's corruption. When Congress won't crack down on price gouging by drug companies, and guts protections for pre-existing conditions, because they're bought by insurance and pharmaceutical industries -- that's corruption. When the federal government silences its own environmental scientists because science threatens the fossil fuel industry -- that's corruption. When dark money from secret donors and powerful industries floods our airwaves with vicious propaganda -- that's corruption. Let's fight back together. The time has come to launch an all-out attack on corruption in America. = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Look, I don't want to be bleak -- but 2020 may be our last chance... Our last chance to deliver health care for every American. Our last chance to save this planet. Our last chance to save our democracy. Our government has squandered trillions on war, trillions on bailouts for failed banks, trillions on tax cuts for rich political donors. And then we're told there 's nothing left over for the people. Why? Because our system is rotten. But here's the good news. We still live in a democracy. We are citizens! We have the power to shape history. = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Listen, I'm an investigative journalist. I lead a team that fights crime and corruption all over the world. We've taken on ISIS war criminals, powerful corporations, human traffickers, and death squads. For that work my team has faced retribution, violence, and even death. But I believe we are all called to fight the abuse of power, even when the odds are against us. That's why I'm running for Senate. = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Look, if you help me win this race, I promise you: There will be hell to pay for those who have propped up this President to score a quick tax cut and the right to destroy our planet. And then, we can get to work building the world we imagine together: Where decency, human rights, shared prosperity, and health define a world we are proud to leave to our children.** This is the fight of a lifetime. I am going to put it all on the line. And right now, I need you with me. Jon = "" | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com = "" | = "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Happy Birthday, Joe!
body:
Join me and Katie Porter by signing this birthday card. | | | |
---
|
# A Special Day
---
| | |
---
| | Joe Sanberg campaigning with Katie Porter in 2018
>
---
| [Sign the Birthday Card! ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=0f0b9f3109&e=3f151f8b74 "Sign the Birthday Card! ")
---
|
###
I will keep this short-

Tomorrow we celebrate someone special and I need you to help me make this day that much more special.

My journey with Moms in Office began in 2018 when Joe Sanberg, founder of Working Hero, introduced me to Katie Porter and her campaign. As a single mom, I knew it right then and there. We need more moms in office like Katie Porter and I set out on a journey to level the playing field for them so that they can level the playing field for us.

Since this day, thanks to our grassroots supporters just like you, we have raised tens of thousands of dollars to help elect moms up and down the ballot across the country and we are just beginning!

Would you join me and Katie Porter to wish Joe Sanberg a very happy birthday by [signing his birthday card](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b52ec19a04&e=3f151f8b74)?

You will make his day!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

---
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a7c8237a7a&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Joe Sanberg is a progressive entrepreneur who is working through both the public and private sectors to end poverty and make people’s lives better. Joe believes that everyone who works – and everyone who wants to but can’t – should be able to afford life’s basic needs and live with financial security.
[https://workingheroaction.org/](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=61d2dff551&e=3f151f8b74)

subject: I'm just a regular guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by William Figlesthaler for Congress
body:
But political insiders are trying to bring me down.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001syC7Tt6tMZU_3aOss6H5JK4-nW4JdY9mv-ktoFx7L43h4N3D8xAfi9Wkw7ew6MCVI2-xrdzOTWupP7y7cG8yAZk3q0-9pdwwSwiWx3VAsw3Iet4lmhwGMTJtVxazAXlzqt15HMdeN5eTgeogRF6kBhEODP-JPQlxrU_P5aJrW-w=&c=-MEGCD133mr5BEf3RMaKD0a0xw73gEI5hswDe4bByFTg3qiQutj3pQ==&ch=aJehzfvmRs9j_xGq-dqM2FbxpvD166BM60-_WUONkHXTEhllmqvDGA==)

|
---
| Peter, As you already know, I'm not a politician.
I don't talk like one, I don't act like one, and I definitely don't lie like one.
But during my short time in politics, I've learned the ugly truth about running for office.
Over the last few months, I've been hit by lies, hate, and baseless attacks from all angles.
But what the opposition doesn't know is that I never give up - ever.

clean_body: But political insiders are trying to bring me down. | | | | | | | == | | Peter, As you already know, I'm not a politician. I don't talk like one, I don't act like one, and I definitely don't lie like one. But during my short time in politics, I've learned the ugly truth about running for office. Over the last few months, I've been hit by lies, hate, and baseless attacks from all angles. But what the opposition doesn't know is that I never give up - ever. == | == | == | Southwest Florida needs a fighter in Washington, and I'm the right guy for the job. name: Madison Hinz
subject: **URGENT** Jessi Campaign Canvassing
body:
Hey y'all!

"Do you want to play a game?"

The first 5 people who hit 200 houses AND log them in the i360 Walk app, will get a $50 cash prize that has been donated by one of our volunteers!!

The one who hits the most houses will also receive an extra $50!!

**You have until Wednesday**

Let me know if you have any questions!

Madison Hinz
Executive Assistant to Jessi Melton for Congress 2020
FL-22 (R)
(954)837-3566
[madison@jessiforcongress.com](mailto:madison@jessiforcongress.com)
<https://secure.anedot.com/jessi-melton-for-congress/donate>

name: Rachel Maddow Show (2020 Update)
subject: Maddow's warning for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
With Republicans playing dirty, we have to fight TWICE as hard and raise TWICE as many resources to win.
| | |
---
**- Rachel Maddow on voter suppression in Georgia -
"IT IS A WAKE-UP CALL FOR WHAT IS COMING IN NOVEMBER AND WHAT REPUBLICANS ARE GOING TO TRY TO DO."**
|
---
|
---
Team, Rachel Maddow is 100% right: The voter suppression in Georgia's primary election was not an accident - it was the latest example of Republicans trying to buy this election and cling to power.
The GOP will do _whatever it takes_ to win - including suppressing our right to vote - and there's simply too much at stake to let them get away with it:

**Right now polling shows Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) NECK AND NECK in Georgia's toss-up race - which _The Washington Post_ says is key to deciding Senate control!**
With Republicans playing dirty, we have to fight TWICE as hard and raise TWICE as many resources to win. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can flip this seat and take back the Senate, but we can't do it without grassroots support.
** We have a historic opportunity to elect voting rights champion Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first Black senator, win in Georgia and end Mitch McConnell's majority once and for all. But with time running out before our critical midnight deadline, we're still falling $7,832 short of our goal and need you to give right now: **

> Peter, that's all the time we have left until the Texas runoff election -- and early voting has already started!
>
> **If we 're going to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November, MJ _must_ win on Tuesday. It's that simple.**
>
> From now through Tuesday, we're running ads across Texas to reach undecided voters before they head to the polls.
>
> **[Real quick: Can you chip in to keep our ads running? We've set a goal of bringing 500 new grassroots donors on board before the runoff.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890132/7f51f7bc/41c461c8/4ef67bec/2276066388/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.1nd__1705__&amount=10")**
>
> Peter, this is our chance to unseat Sen. Cornyn and elect a new leader who'll represent _Texans_ , not _special interests_ , in the Senate. But MJ needs to win the runoff first!
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890132/7f51f7bc/41c461c8/4ef67bec/2276066388/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.1nd__1705__&amount=10")**
> \-- Team MJ
>
> P.S. We need to reach as many undecided voters as possible in the next 72 hours. Your first* donation will help us keep our ads up. **[Contribute now!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890132/7f51f7bc/41c461c8/4ef67bec/2276066388/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.1nd__1705__&amount=10")**
>
> _*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._
>
>

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890132/7f51f7bc/41c461c8/4ef67be3/2276066388/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MDUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1705&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890132/7f51f7bc/41c461c8/4ef67be2/2276066388/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

body:
Yes, another one
|

| | We have a big FEC deadline coming up NEXT WEEK. I know, I know -- it feels like we just had a big FEC deadline. That's because we did. **We just finished the FEC end-of-quarter deadline at the end of June, and now we 've got another one just for Tennessee with a pre-primary FEC filing deadline __on Friday, July 17th.__** [_**We need to raise $25,000 before the deadline. If you can, will you chip in?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa136/18d6a294/4c85a86f/26d7f451/919515263/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200711?refcode=jme200711_a_other&refcode2=107423") | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa136/18d6a294/4c85a86f/26d7f451/919515263/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200711?refcode=jme200711_a_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Here's the deal -- all the insiders are counting us out.
That's because James isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs while Trump's **hand-picked** candidate Bill Hagerty rakes in **millions** from corporate PACs and sweetheart loans thanks to his insider connections and his promise to rubber-stamp whatever special interests want.
But folks, I know this grassroots team has what it takes to defeat dark money at the ballot box and send a combat veteran to the Senate who will serve all Tennesseans -- not special interests. We do need everyone pitching in to make it happen.
[_**This unique FEC deadline next Friday does give us a great opportunity to make a huge show of strength and show Bill Hagerty and his extremist allies that we 're a force to be reckoned with. If you can, chip in now to help us reach our $25,000 goal.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa136/18d6a294/4c85a86f/26d7f451/919515263/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTEiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200711?refcode=jme200711_a_other&refcode2=107423")

Thanks,
Dave

name: Joe Biden
subject: Please Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The character of our country is on the ballot this year. |
---
Hey Peter,

I don't have to tell you that this is a pivotal time for our nation and for the entire planet, and that there is so much work we have to do to win this election and defeat Donald Trump in November.

But it's about more than just winning an election. The character of our country is on the ballot this year.

We have an obligation to change this country for everyone -- to come together as Americans to solve the challenges ahead of us.

It really is a battle for the soul of our nation -- but the thing about battles is that they are not won alone. You are a critical part of this fight.

**So I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race and defeat Donald Trump, if you 're able.**

[**Please Peter, could you pitch in $5 before you close your inbox today? We have less than four months to make our case to voters in this election, and your contribution means we 'll reach more folks and have a better shot at a victory »**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $5>>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $50 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2")** Look, it's not a secret that Trump has millions of dollars in the bank to spend on this election. It's just a fact.

He's already poured enormous amounts of money into battleground states to try and lie his way into four more years in the White House.

But here's the thing, Peter: Together, we have built a team of millions of folks across the country who have stepped up in a huge way to fuel our campaign.

We might not be able to match Trump dollar for dollar, but thanks to this truly amazing grassroots team, we'll be able to compete in expensive states like Florida, Pennsylvania, and Texas.

**Thanks to you and folks like you, we have a real shot at winning and bringing honesty and decency back to the White House -- but only if we keep up the fight, Peter. That 's why I'm asking you today, even though it's the part of this job that I like the least, to pitch in if you can.**

[**So, Peter, if you 're able, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to fuel this campaign today? Any way you can support this fight means so much.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.12_B1_character_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2")

From the bottom of my heart, Peter -- thank you for standing with me. I know there's nothing we can't accomplish if we do it together.

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28d7/899711719/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28d6/899711719/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28d3/899711719/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28d2/899711719/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28cc/899711719/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28c6/899711719/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer-wsupporterboxJRB")

[DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28ce/899711719/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer-wsupporterboxJRB&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28ca/899711719/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bf7e/1cd0ac28/8bad8e34/357c28c2/899711719/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: The character of our country is on the ballot this year. | Hey Peter, I don't have to tell you that this is a pivotal time for our nation and for the entire planet, and that there is so much work we have to do to win this election and defeat Donald Trump in November. But it's about more than just winning an election. The character of our country is on the ballot this year. We have an obligation to change this country for everyone -- to come together as Americans to solve the challenges ahead of us. It really is a battle for the soul of our nation -- but the thing about battles is that they are not won alone. You are a critical part of this fight. So I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race and defeat Donald Trump, if you 're able. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Look, it's not a secret that Trump has millions of dollars in the bank to spend on this election. It's just a fact. He's already poured enormous amounts of money into battleground states to try and lie his way into four more years in the White House. But here's the thing, Peter: Together, we have built a team of millions of folks across the country who have stepped up in a huge way to fuel our campaign. We might not be able to match Trump dollar for dollar, but thanks to this truly amazing grassroots team, we'll be able to compete in expensive states like Florida, Pennsylvania, and Texas. Thanks to you and folks like you, we have a real shot at winning and bringing honesty and decency back to the White House -- but only if we keep up the fight, Peter. That 's why I'm asking you today, even though it's the part of this job that I like the least, to pitch in if you can. "" From the bottom of my heart, Peter -- thank you for standing with me. I know there's nothing we can't accomplish if we do it together. Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" "" Donated to Biden for President? No, not yet! Suggested Action: "" | "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:
New merch added to our store!

Stock up for summer with yard signs, bumper stickers, hats, and shirts!

Shop now >> https://store.joshhicksforcongress.com

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e3a/2670838691/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

We hope this email finds you safe and healthy! Team Warner is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate. Below are some of Mark's priorities and updates on legislation that we mentioned in previous update emails.

**Here 's some of what Mark is focused on right now:**
* As coronavirus cases spike nationwide, Mark joined Senate colleagues in sending a letter to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) **[urging several government agencies to reconsider bringing federal employees back to work sites prematurely.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e39/2670838691/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://federalnewsnetwork.com/workforce/2020/07/administrations-reopening-plans-unsafe-for-federal-employees-senators-say/")** Mark believes that federal workers should have access to telework and other health protections.

* Mark joined Senators Gary Peters, Bob Casey, and Jacky Rosen in introducing the _1619 Act_ to increase awareness and access to African American history in our schools, with educational programs and training opportunities for instructors from the National Museum of African American History and Culture. Black history needs to be recognized beyond the month of February, as an important part of our history curriculums.

* Last week, Mark introduced the _Accessible, Affordable, Internet for All Act_ , **[a bill to expand access to affordable high-speed internet.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e38/2670838691/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-leads-bill-to-expand-access-to-affordable-high-speed-internet/")** More than 700,000 Virginians don't have reliable broadband internet access, and Mark has been focused on bridging the digital divide throughout his time in the Senate.

* In June, the _Great American Outdoors Act_ passed the Senate with bi-partisan support. The bill, which also includes full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF), could support **[100,000 jobs across the country-- 10,000 in Virginia alone](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e27/2670838691/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.dnronline.com/opinion/viewpoint/celebrating-the-great-american-outdoors/article_eea7986f-1ab2-5917-92a6-21f1d9aea44f.html")** -- while providing the resources to address the maintenance backlog in our national parks.

| ➙ | **Up next:** This bill has to pass in the House of Representatives before it goes to the President's desk for signature.
---|---|---
Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e26/2670838691/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbc3/53d9897e/5446e148/1c884e25/2670838691/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: preserving our right to vote in these times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Texas is quickly becoming one of the highest-risk states in the country for COVID-19 transmission. We know that the best way to protect ourselves during this pandemic is to stay home and avoid large gatherings. But we’re in an election year, and with each election, we’re seeing vulnerable people forced to risk their health to go vote.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230235/221575873/526516301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDJkZS04NWM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4jYIr1Txhzggi4BEARfxAjSDSx2j14SDoJc4ExgY78=&emci=7b0dcc1f-7fc4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=43c342de-85c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230236/221575874/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDJkZS04NWM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4jYIr1Txhzggi4BEARfxAjSDSx2j14SDoJc4ExgY78=&emci=7b0dcc1f-7fc4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=43c342de-85c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Friend,

Texas is quickly becoming one of the highest-risk states in the country for COVID-19 transmission. We know that the best way to protect ourselves during this pandemic is to stay home and avoid large gatherings. But we’re in an election year, and with each election, we’re seeing vulnerable people forced to risk their health to go vote.

**That shouldn’t be the case, friend.** People should be able to protect themselves and exercise their right to vote in these unprecedented times. But state governments are failing to take the necessary measures to make sure people can vote from home --_and Republicans are continuing their shameful tradition of voter suppression by spreading misinformation about the security of vote-by-mail and forcing in-person elections to happen._

[**That is an outrage, friend. That’s why I’m calling on Congress to immediately enact legislation to implement federal vote-by-mail and expand the vote, not restrict it. Will you join me and add your name?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230237/221575875/526516301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDJkZS04NWM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4jYIr1Txhzggi4BEARfxAjSDSx2j14SDoJc4ExgY78=&emci=7b0dcc1f-7fc4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=43c342de-85c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) | [Sign the petition ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230238/221575876/526516301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDJkZS04NWM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4jYIr1Txhzggi4BEARfxAjSDSx2j14SDoJc4ExgY78=&emci=7b0dcc1f-7fc4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=43c342de-85c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)
---
To force people, including our elderly and immunocompromised, to go to a large gathering and put their lives at risk in order to vote is unjust.

_And there is a solution to fix it._

Voting by mail is a safe, easy, and secure way to ensure that everyone can exercise their right to vote. Other states that have already adopted vote-by-mail consistently have high voter turnout, **and their vote-by-mail systems have bipartisan support**. In the midst of a pandemic, we should be expanding the right to vote. We don’t want to end up like Wisconsin, whose Republican legislature forced in-person voting and saw a spike in coronavirus cases right after.

[**I am taking a stand and demanding that we implement national vote-by-mail as a common-sense public health solution -- and I’m asking you to take a stand with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230239/221575877/526516301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2MzNDJkZS04NWM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4jYIr1Txhzggi4BEARfxAjSDSx2j14SDoJc4ExgY78=&emci=7b0dcc1f-7fc4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=43c342de-85c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524)

clean_body: Texas is quickly becoming one of the highest-risk states in the country for COVID-19 transmission. We know that the best way to protect ourselves during this pandemic is to stay home and avoid large gatherings. But we’re in an election year, and with each election, we’re seeing vulnerable people forced to risk their health to go vote. | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Friend, Texas is quickly becoming one of the highest-risk states in the country for COVID-19 transmission. We know that the best way to protect ourselves during this pandemic is to stay home and avoid large gatherings. But we’re in an election year, and with each election, we’re seeing vulnerable people forced to risk their health to go vote. That shouldn’t be the case, friend. People should be able to protect themselves and exercise their right to vote in these unprecedented times. But state governments are failing to take the necessary measures to make sure people can vote from home --and Republicans are continuing their shameful tradition of voter suppression by spreading misinformation about the security of vote-by-mail and forcing in-person elections to happen. | To force people, including our elderly and immunocompromised, to go to a large gathering and put their lives at risk in order to vote is unjust. And there is a solution to fix it. Voting by mail is a safe, easy, and secure way to ensure that everyone can exercise their right to vote. Other states that have already adopted vote-by-mail consistently have high voter turnout, and their vote-by-mail systems have bipartisan support. In the midst of a pandemic, we should be expanding the right to vote. We don’t want to end up like Wisconsin, whose Republican legislature forced in-person voting and saw a spike in coronavirus cases right after. Thank you, \--Sri | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: Let's send Sen. Cornyn packing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Here's the thing about Sen. Cornyn's retirement...

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890135/7f51f7bc/41d975b8/4ef67bdf/877544568/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Look, Peter, it's time to send Sen. Cornyn home to Texas for retirement. All kidding aside **we 're completely serious about the damage that he's done to this country.**

From his xenophobic, bigoted posts on Twitter, to his efforts to repeal the Affordable Care Act, to the partisan judges he's championed, to his refusal to support meaningful gun safety legislation or immigration reform, Sen. Cornyn has not represented Texas. **[DONATE FOR A SENATOR TO REPRESENT TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890135/7f51f7bc/41d975b8/4ef67bde/877544568/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200712.2nd__1694__&amount=10")** While **corporate PACs, the Koch network, Big Pharma, and the NRA** are spending millions to keep him in office, it's clear that **everyday Texans don 't want him there**. With only a **29% approval rating**, it's time for Sen. Cornyn to retire.

I will fight for **workers ' rights**, for **criminal justice reform** , for **expanded access to health care** , for **a safer world for our kids** , and most importantly, **I 'll fight for you**. It's high time we elect a fighter to represent Texas in the U.S. Senate, and we've got a Texas-sized grassroots team ready to retire Sen. Cornyn.

**So what do you say, Peter, are you with me?** | **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_**

Let's show what a surging, people-powered grassroots campaign looks like. "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" The wind is at our back. Let's keep it going, Team Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

body:

|
# Happy Birthday!
---
| | | [SIGN THE BIRTHDAY CARD!](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b7589a392e&e=3f151f8b74 "SIGN THE BIRTHDAY CARD!")

>
---
| [$4.10](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=77450b26a8&e=3f151f8b74 "$4.10")

|
###
Friend,

Today we celebrate someone special. Will you [sign this birthday card ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=209fffc3bd&e=3f151f8b74)to help us wish Joe a very Happy 41st Birthday? He will be thrilled to hear from you!

And, if you are in a position to give $4.10 in honor of his 41st birthday every single dollar will go toward supporting his organization's work. Your contribution will help Joe and [Working Hero](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fb4c9baeee&e=3f151f8b74) elect more champions for working families like Katie Porter, Jamaal Bowman, JD Scholten, Kara Eastman, and more.

THANK YOU!

Moms in Office

| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=0ffedb6aea&e=3f151f8b74)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Donald Trump's priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Our nation is in the middle of a pandemic, economic recession, and crisis of community relations and yet Donald Trump's laser focus is on: t _rying to dismantle the Postal Service._

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FVLfB5IJ4bp6A2Y8pePuZ5n4tAeZPkIb_05bZxGupo0=/WbMB3czGqSXoGsnsHnEMvYhfxIwZTmSHdFol9PFHmqY=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_071120_USPSJA_C%26amount%3D25)

**Of all the things Donald Trump could be doing to make our nation run better, he has decided to attack the Postal Service -- an agency that is useful, important, and necessary for millions of Americans. **

I refuse to let Trump mail it in on our Postal Service and I will continue to stand with my Congressional colleagues in defense of our postal workers' jobs.

[**Will you add your name to my petition calling on Congress to protect the Postal Service from Trump 's devastating proposed cuts?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FVLfB5IJ4bp6A2Y8pePuZ5n4tAeZPkIb_05bZxGupo0=/qvpZ1eGolsMAxhrnHHbZyS6bV7RDcuueJGjyekkr_qo=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_071120_USPSJA_C%26amount%3D25)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FVLfB5IJ4bp6A2Y8pePuZ5n4tAeZPkIb_05bZxGupo0=/qvpZ1eGolsMAxhrnHHbZyS6bV7RDcuueJGjyekkr_qo=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_071120_USPSJA_C%26amount%3D25)

Thank you for defending your local post office,

\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

Friend,

Wow.

We cannot tell you enough how integral grassroots conservatives, like YOU, have been in our success so far. Despite the endless attacks by the Fake News media, we’re stronger than ever before.

We’ve been SHATTERING fundraising expectations since day one, and we haven’t slowed down since. In addition to raising a RECORD BREAKING $14 MILLION online in ONE SINGLE DAY, we finished the second quarter strong with another $266 MILLION - a massive fundraising achievement.

name: Jamilla Espy
subject: Mississippi’s victory in the New York Times

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18230924/221616128/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDRkNTNlYi05OGM0LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=458jgZEpa_YucTkPNNrNYyZlwwM_azHkzE0tlQmDs4g=&emci=e34d53eb-98c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=e44d53eb-98c4-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hey, Spending my childhood growing up in Mississippi, I never thought I’d see the day that our state flag with the confederate battle emblem would be taken down. I know my dad didn’t expect to see that in his lifetime either. That flag had flown across our state for 126 years, despite countless attempts to change it. But after young Black Lives Matter protesters mobilized and built a coalition of wide ranging support across Mississippi to finally remove this painful relic of the confederacy – **we proved that Mississippi is changing, whether Cindy Hyde-Smith likes it or not.** This seemingly impossible victory was highlighted in the _New York Times_ yesterday, emphasizing that this movement is led by young Black people who for too long have either felt uncomfortable in their own home state, or feel as though the rest of the country misunderstands us because of our reputation for racism. From the state flag, to the historic number of lynchings, to the statues and monuments honoring confederate leaders, to the racial slurs and bullying folks like my dad had to endure in school – we can’t ignore Mississippi’s history of pain. But what we proved with this totally unexpected victory is that Mississippi is not only capable of change, _it’s already changing before our eyes._ I couldn’t be more proud or excited about it. Like Calvert White, an Alcorn State University student said, this moment is “...A catalyst for change, because we have had this painful discussion about the flag. There are so many opportunities that we can take to get on the right footing and get that equity.” **The momentum for more change is here, but we have to keep it growing. We need a leader who’s ready to move forward with the rest of Mississippi, and that person is my dad, Mike Espy.** My dad marched side-by-side with Black Lives Matter protesters in Jackson a few weeks ago and joined community leaders in calling for a new flag. He’s leading the call for replacing Mississippi’s confederate statues in the U.S. Capitol, and he wants to address the core problems that cause inequity and injustice, like the lack of access to affordable health care, good public schools, and job opportunities. Mississippi Black Lives Matter organizer Timothy Young said about Mississippi, _“If we didn’t love it, we wouldn’t fight for it,”_ and that’s what drove my dad to run for U.S. Senate again: he loves Mississippi and is ready to put in the hard work to fight for it. **Let’s do whatever it takes to send my dad to the U.S. Senate to fight for a Mississippi where everyone feels comfortable and proud to call this state home. body:
Hi everyone, It's been another busy week on the campaign trail. This week I had the honor of meeting with Mayor Derek Slaughter, the mayor o
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=9zxtG7oHHX1NmyocHg5QENjJX3bKhOL-TIgOIZof818.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Q2TkQ0VEVWbyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9)
---
| | | | Lee's Newsletter - July 12th
---
| | Hi everyone, It's been another busy week on the campaign trail. This week I had the honor of meeting with Mayor Derek Slaughter, the mayor of Williamsport. We spoke about a range of topics, including pandemic recovery, community policing, and voter disenfranchisement. I'm excited for the opportunity to be able to support our local leadership and communities on these and other issues from the federal level.
---
| | I also spent time with Lycoming County resident and RDA member Barb Jarmoska to learn more about the impact of fracking in her area. We discussed the existing and planned sites of gas wells neighboring her property on Loyalsock Creek. We talked about measures at the federal level that could help local communities with gas drilling, including removing fracking exemptions from the Safe Drinking Water Act and other federal laws. When the industry was starting up in PA, I hoped that gas drilling would provide a boost to our district's economy, and potentially provide a bridge for the country to move from fossil fuels to renewable energy. While that move has not yet happened, we still need to make sure that our communities are protected from air and water pollution.
---
|
---
| | As part of the Democratic State Committee online events happening this week, I had the pleasure of joining both the Pennsylvania Democratic Black Caucus and Latino Caucus this Saturday. It was enlightening and inspiring to see and hear such passionate community leaders, elected officials and candidates discuss the work they're doing to address the various issues facing their constituents, such as the need for bilingual mail-in ballot applications, police reform and raising the minimum wage. At the national level, we had several disappointing pieces of news, too many to cover them all here. After some encouraging decisions recently, the Supreme Court ruled that employers and universities can refuse to cover birth control to women for whom they provide healthcare coverage. This disappointing decision could cost over 126,000 women contraception coverage, including women who use birth control for other medical issues such as endometriosis and polycystic ovary syndrome. I firmly believe that women should have the right to use contraception without interference from their employers or the government. On Monday, the administration also announced that international students would not be allowed to study in the country if they have a fully online course load, which could affect the over 7,000 international students in our district's colleges and universities. This is yet another case of the White House using the pandemic as an excuse to restrict all forms of immigration. Pronouncements like this, and the administration's previous suspension on issuing of new green cards and work visas, are clear indications that it's not just undocumented immigrants that the administration has a problem with, but all immigrants. For us to win and enact better, more constructive policies around the environment, women's health, immigration and so many other issues - our campaign continues to need your support. Please donate if you can, any amount makes a difference. If you're not able to donate, there are other ways to help. Our phone banking team is holding ongoing virtual volunteer training, [click here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=-ON6ktN6Mf7imyogNqRi5vPjGJWbd3UH08fsTkHZV2o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9nZXQtaW52b2x2ZWQiLCJyIjoiOGM3NTUzMzAtZjZiYi00NDVmLTEzMGEtNTE0MWQ5NzBmMjUyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZmY5MWEyMGQtZGIxOS00NGQ1LWIzZWUtOWIzZjhkYjBiYzJlIn0) to sign up. Please also help get the word out by sharing our [Donation](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=IcJWccrGEtIkfOC9puUGMXGkzdCt4OftRWOUlHAHz70.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xlZWdyaWZmaW5mb3Jjb25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiI4Yzc1NTMzMC1mNmJiLTQ0NWYtMTMwYS01MTQxZDk3MGYyNTIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) page, [Facebook](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=J3fsRlKqX2FyAI291yx2-w-1CSNutq7K4vSKAIkHTPA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vbGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzIiwiciI6IjhjNzU1MzMwLWY2YmItNDQ1Zi0xMzBhLTUxNDFkOTcwZjI1MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9) page, [website](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=3UxSixmGWUJkEgRza457aKKetPhul5ie1SS_Z1mw6Aw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9MZWVHcmlmZmluRm9yQ29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tIiwiciI6IjhjNzU1MzMwLWY2YmItNDQ1Zi0xMzBhLTUxNDFkOTcwZjI1MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9), [Instagram](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=gtYHX-DbZjZLhuoJnd5RhuOHhfflEp7ZSKJ6FpZe9J8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9pbnN0YWdyYW0uY29tL2xlZWdyaWZmaW5mb3Jjb25ncmVzcyIsInIiOiI4Yzc1NTMzMC1mNmJiLTQ0NWYtMTMwYS01MTQxZDk3MGYyNTIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) and even this newsletter with your friends and family. Your support is everything. Coming up this week, my 15 county virtual tour continues with our online Meet and Greet with the Juniata County Democrats. For more information or to sign up, please click [here](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6ND4TEVo/c?w=w0hXMv8hFBTWYMz7_P-aFfQSGodkqtZ4_5Jbr_VGE6Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2V2ZW50cy8xMjk2NDMxMTI3NDE1NTI4LyIsInIiOiI4Yzc1NTMzMC1mNmJiLTQ0NWYtMTMwYS01MTQxZDk3MGYyNTIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ). I think one of my favorite parts of this campaign is getting to know you all better and to hear more about what matters to you and your communities. Please continue to sign up for these online events and reach out. I love hearing from you. I hope you all have a happy and safe week,
Lee

subject: The USPS needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
Let's get one thing straight: The USPS will play a _central_ _role_ in November's election. Due to COVID-19, we'll likely see a higher number of people voting-by-mail than ever before. Therefore, it's _imperative_ we have a functioning postal service so ballots are delivered and counted.
**Unfortunately, the USPS is under severe financial strain right now. That's why I'm asking Congress to take action and save the USPS. [Will you show your support for our national postal service by signing on?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmXPy3GHQf4Ei5c9Kw7bk17RrMa_2FiGZsLJyz64oj8=/uk1ZojVnRmS2BKkbhWyb6dnHPQqigXq5Ms-f8trKMAM=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmXPy3GHQf4Ei5c9Kw7bk17RrMa_2FiGZsLJyz64oj8=/eY11Uv-nULYMrLJ-S8cCEoxj1bdy8ffeye4lN4SORRE=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)
President Trump has made it clear he thinks the USPS is "a joke," and has no intention to saving it. Tell that to the _600,000_ USPS employees who process roughly _182 million_ mail items every single day. The USPS even predates our Constitution; now, it's up to Congress to save it.
[**Demand Congress act now to save the USPS >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmXPy3GHQf4Ei5c9Kw7bk17RrMa_2FiGZsLJyz64oj8=/uk1ZojVnRmS2BKkbhWyb6dnHPQqigXq5Ms-f8trKMAM=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jmXPy3GHQf4Ei5c9Kw7bk17RrMa_2FiGZsLJyz64oj8=/eY11Uv-nULYMrLJ-S8cCEoxj1bdy8ffeye4lN4SORRE=?code=Sanchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_0720_USPAJA)
Thank you for taking action,
\--_Linda S anchez_

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: MJ Hegar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
MJ Hegar is running in Texas, and she's got a real chance to win in November and help Democrats take the Senate. But first, she needs to win her primary this Tuesday, and she needs support from the su | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e9/45c30650/1cce1076f/66e8422c/146630695/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Something's happening in Texas.

The latest polls there have Joe Biden and Donald Trump just a few points apart. In one from a few weeks ago, Joe Biden is actually ahead. In Texas.

And you know whose approval ratings are dropping? John Cornyn -- the GOP Texas senator up for re-election this November.

**MJ Hegar is running against him, and I'm proud to support her. She's got a real chance to win in November and help Democrats take the Senate. But first, she needs to win her primary this Tuesday, and she needs support from this grassroots team.**

**[If you're able to support candidates financially right now, will you split a donation between MJ Hegar and our re-election campaign today? $2 or whatever you can contribute would make a real difference to help elect MJ and lift up Democratic candidates across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e9/45c30650/1cce1076f/66e8422f/146630695/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW1oIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwOUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-mh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT09F_EGR_END_E_20200712_V1S1_P")**

As a decorated combat veteran and working mom who has lived through many of the challenges facing Texans, MJ is a proven fighter.

She will ensure every Texan has affordable health care, economic opportunity, and a government that works for people -- not corporate special interests and billionaires.

At a time when working families are being squeezed to their breaking point, we need fighters in the United States Senate like MJ Hegar who embody strength, courage, independence, and an unwavering commitment to putting families first. She will fight for real results for the people of Texas.

And by building a well-funded grassroots organization in 2020, MJ will also lift up the entire Democratic ticket in Texas -- including candidates in toss-up races for the U.S. House and state and local positions.

A donation to MJ is an investment in a whole host of candidates who can flip seats across Texas. And by splitting your contribution with Warren Democrats, you can help elect leaders across the country who know we need big ideas and bold reform -- to root out corruption and put people first.

**[So, if it makes sense for you right now, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help elect MJ and support Warren Democrats like her across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e9/45c30650/1cce1076f/66e8422f/146630695/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLW1oIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQwOUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-mh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT09F_EGR_END_E_20200712_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: MJ Hegar is running in Texas, and she's got a real chance to win in November and help Democrats take the Senate. But first, she needs to win her primary this Tuesday, and she needs support from the su | | | "" Something's happening in Texas. The latest polls there have Joe Biden and Donald Trump just a few points apart. In one from a few weeks ago, Joe Biden is actually ahead. In Texas. And you know whose approval ratings are dropping? John Cornyn -- the GOP Texas senator up for re-election this November. MJ Hegar is running against him, and I'm proud to support her. She's got a real chance to win in November and help Democrats take the Senate. But first, she needs to win her primary this Tuesday, and she needs support from this grassroots team. "" As a decorated combat veteran and working mom who has lived through many of the challenges facing Texans, MJ is a proven fighter. She will ensure every Texan has affordable health care, economic opportunity, and a government that works for people -- not corporate special interests and billionaires. At a time when working families are being squeezed to their breaking point, we need fighters in the United States Senate like MJ Hegar who embody strength, courage, independence, and an unwavering commitment to putting families first. She will fight for real results for the people of Texas. And by building a well-funded grassroots organization in 2020, MJ will also lift up the entire Democratic ticket in Texas -- including candidates in toss-up races for the U.S. House and state and local positions. A donation to MJ is an investment in a whole host of candidates who can flip seats across Texas. And by splitting your contribution with Warren Democrats, you can help elect leaders across the country who know we need big ideas and bold reform -- to root out corruption and put people first. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm ready to make history together. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Georgians deserve a senator who fights for justice, not for stock options.
| | |
---
Friend,

In a minute, I'm going to ask you to support our people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to the Senate. **But first, I want to explain why your support is so important, and what will happen without it.**
I grew up in a housing project in Savannah, Georgia. Every morning, my father would wake me up at 6 a.m. and say, "Put your shoes on. There's something for you to do. I don't know exactly what it is yet, but be ready."
So I've spent my entire life trying to be ready for anything - and most importantly, ready to serve. With hard work and support from my family and community, I was blessed to become the first member of my family to graduate from college. And 14 years ago, the kid who grew up in the projects was called to Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church.

**Now, I'm ready to make history by becoming the first Black senator in Georgia's history - but I can't win without your help: [Please, will you donate $5 right now to our grassroots movement to flip Georgia blue and make our Congress reflect our country?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5e5/288179be/867218d/348e6b48/3003147928/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5e5/288179be/867218d/348e6b48/3003147928/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Some might ask why a pastor thinks he should serve in the Senate. Here's what I'd tell them: I've committed my whole life to service and helping people realize their highest potential - and I've always believed that my impact doesn't stop at the church door, that's actually where it starts.
My Republican opponent, Sen. Kelly Loeffler, has a different idea of service. Rather than work to earn the trust and support of everyday Georgians, she's desperate to spend $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat outright.
And when she's not pushing Mitch McConnell's dangerous agenda, she's prioritizing her own. She knew critical information about the coronavirus threat - but instead of telling her constituents, she rushed to protect her own pockets by selling _millions_ in personal stock right before the market tanked. Who does that serve?

I'm running to restore moral leadership to Washington and give a voice to folks across this state who wonder why politicians like Kelly Loeffler aren't looking out for them. But in a race this close - with polling showing us _neck and neck _- I need your grassroots support to stand a chance.
**Friend: Georgians deserve a senator who fights for justice, not for stock options. Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to _The Washington Post_ confirm that we can win this race, but the GOP is doing everything in its power to stop us. That's why I'm asking you to donate ****now ****so we have what it takes to fight back and flip Georgia blue:**
**[_Please, if _you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats and restoring moral leadership to our country, will you rush $5 or more right now to flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5e5/288179be/867218d/348e6b48/3003147928/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [Donate $25](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5e5/288179be/867218d/348e6b48/3003147928/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzYxLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk361-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
I'm so grateful for your support. Thank you.

Reverend Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5e5/288179be/867218d/348e6b44/3003147928/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Special Session to End Walz Powers Starts Monday
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=special_session_on_monday&n=1)
---
Peter -- Governor Walz extended his never-ending emergency powers again on Friday, then called for a second Special Session of the Legislature. So the circus continues in St Paul. As legislators prepare to convene Monday morning at the Capitol, the fate of ending Walz' Emergency Powers rests in the hands of Senator Paul Gazelka and Seven More Democrat Legislators. First things first, Senator Gazelka should **not** be willing to pass one piece of legislation, especially a bonding debt bill and the Jacob Frey bailout, while Walz' powers remain intact. Don't let him betray us!
## Senator Gazelka's cell: 218-821-9287.
### Call or TEXT him! Tell him "No deals with Democrats on bonding or bailing out Minneapolis unless the House removes Walz' powers."
Secondly, we asked you to reach out to Seven Democrat legislators last week. Thank you to everyone who called and e-mailed. We've heard many reports of their phone lines being overwhelmed with your calls. If you haven't reached out to them yet, will you help us get these Democrats on board? We need you to continue lighting up these Seven DFLers' phones and email accounts right NOW. **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Rep Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 /[rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn](mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn)** **Rep Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 /[rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn](mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn)** **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Script** _**:** _ _Rep __________, Governor Walz' emergency powers are doing more harm to Minnesota families and businesses than good. We can’t have one person deciding what rules we need to follow. It’s time you restore our Democracy and exercise your legislative power to End Walz’ Emergency Powers now. Otherwise I’m going to do everything in my power to help your opponent this November._ **Don’t have the time to contact them? We've been running ads in their districts. Help us out by[contributing](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=special_session_on_monday&n=2) to our digital ad campaign targeting voters in their districts. Let’s put an end to Walz’ Emergency Powers, stop him from forcing us to wear masks and put freedom back in your hands. It’s time Minnesota wakes back up.
## **[Help us be that wake up call!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=special_session_on_monday&n=5)**
