clean_body: | Peter -- Governor Walz extended his never-ending emergency powers again on Friday, then called for a second Special Session of the Legislature. So the circus continues in St Paul. As legislators prepare to convene Monday morning at the Capitol, the fate of ending Walz' Emergency Powers rests in the hands of Senator Paul Gazelka and Seven More Democrat Legislators. First things first, Senator Gazelka should not be willing to pass one piece of legislation, especially a bonding debt bill and the Jacob Frey bailout, while Walz' powers remain intact. Don't let him betray us! Senator Gazelka's cell: 218-821-9287. Call or TEXT him! Tell him "No deals with Democrats on bonding or bailing out Minneapolis unless the House removes Walz' powers." Secondly, we asked you to reach out to Seven Democrat legislators last week. Thank you to everyone who called and e-mailed. We've heard many reports of their phone lines being overwhelmed with your calls. If you haven't reached out to them yet, will you help us get these Democrats on board? We need you to continue lighting up these Seven DFLers' phones and email accounts right NOW. Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn Rep Dave Lislegard - 651-296-0170 /mailto:rep.dave.lislegard@house.mn Rep Julie Sandstede - 651-296-0172 /mailto:rep.julie.sandstede@house.mn Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn Script : Rep ______, Governor Walz' emergency powers are doing more harm to Minnesota families and businesses than good. We can’t have one person deciding what rules we need to follow. It’s time you restore our Democracy and exercise your legislative power to End Walz’ Emergency Powers now. Otherwise I’m going to do everything in my power to help your opponent this November. Don’t have the time to contact them? We've been running ads in their districts. Help us out by to our digital ad campaign targeting voters in their districts. Here’s a preview of one of the ads we’re running. | "CONTRIBUTE" Let’s put an end to Walz’ Emergency Powers, stop him from forcing us to wear masks and put freedom back in your hands. It’s time Minnesota wakes back up. In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Battleground Texas
subject: MJ Hegar CAN take on Sen. Cornyn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
And she knows just how terrible Sen. Cornyn has been for Texans.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67bc4/1153154846/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67c3b/1153154846/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.3nd__1699__&amount=10")
---
As a combat veteran and working mom, MJ understands just how badly Sen. Cornyn has failed Texas families. Here's just a few of the ways:
* He led the effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act AND blocked several bills to lower prescription drug prices.
* He accepted a check from the NRA just days after a mass shooting here in Texas.
* He covered for the president after the administration did NOTHING as foreign powers put bounties on the heads of our soldiers.

Sen. Cornyn has _consistently_ put his donors and political allies ahead of Texans. This Tuesday is our chance to nominate a candidate who can take him on and WIN -- but MJ needs your help to keep reaching undecided voters before the Tuesday runoff!

**[Pitch in now to help us reach our goal of 500 new donors and keep our digital ads running through election night!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67c3b/1153154846/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.3nd__1699__&amount=10")**

It's up to us to nominate a candidate who can defeat Sen. Cornyn once and for all.

\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67c3b/1153154846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoffads?refcode=email_20200712.3nd__1699__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67c3a/1153154846/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE2OTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1699&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890137/7f51f7bc/41da7c2f/4ef67c39/1153154846/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Team Hunt has been hard at work this week building our campaign effort and preparing for November. We have covered a lot of ground so far and I look forward to all we will accomplish in the coming months.

On Monday, I was honored to receive Secretary James Baker's formal endorsement of my campaign for Congressional District 7. Secretary Baker's long and formidable career in politics and diplomacy is emblematic of his remarkable commitment serving our country. I thank Secretary Baker for his support and look forward to continuing to work with him to bring new leadership to this district. You can find the full announcement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=90b6b5139b3e46f7b39715cdec86bc53&_e=zAtCsec_sCogbICrBHA1KPFvg6mtjGc4rFfADR4K6kImdh3ARIP68vIPPZPLhP-DwKDBkfhUua4s_P5Yinxrkybq-h7bkR5_yYgDnHAlKVqdiAnByZ_bnTkwIZBnXqtrUSoW-RRATfQoYY7YilnyA0fo493tDdmeRJAnt8cZ_5CfPpb0ycnZmtRw-iOK3ZgghzBkE6Qv36UaWUci5rXm3B_fCnGL1V2NzW5N4FityzZYzh8J-Az1ynMb5W8SnRRRaEC9ZahCuNlYToJqdJzmQP6LtADvF1Snv5vuP9v2YFc%3D).

On Tuesday, I was humbled to announce that, thanks to the support of people like you, we raised $900,000 in Q2 this year. This is a clear message to me that voters in TX-07 are ready for a change. I am incredibly grateful for your support and I'm ready to work even harder to beat Lizzie Fletcher in November.

On Wednesday, I joined nearly 50 of our incredible Team Hunt interns to discuss the campaign and their goals and interests. I am so proud of this talented group of young Texans; their support gives my campaign unstoppable energy and momentum to flip TX-07 red in November. Watching young conservatives work hard to promote and defend their values gives me hope and reassurance for our future.

ICYMI: The standout intern program supporting my campaign was recently covered in an article in Roll Call, you can read it [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=90b6b5139b3e46f7b39715cdec86bc53&_e=zAtCsec_sCogbICrBHA1KD1AcUikqj80cdbJoDYaBNntBhUHoxwqwXcb1EHPXoHZUsGUI6U77CvnGyDAryESAt4XTviAZKSeChRFEunb5GcXZME289c1EPwXOkIYTjjOyWxMyECblJgQZV89Wd74dKxrFoBcIEE5rYIBy5tMHyDoBB36rZZh9__DmzCSDGbjzMjuO7FMlQNUad9fovHB4B7Yp-K4c5mXhLA8g7Ahj0GO_PyJeaLmidLCNcZzglCTK-7PXpxRMceWwt4MuSwGDvFm9I03AecpHkqEKKGfY-MtBescZiL2futvVbzJBrJyc-InNo7vcD9umfMT_gDfJah4GJPo1LI7NTmo_sPwPVWaQLNCMa4CHZV7kH86YqFK). A big thanks to these young supporters for all of their hard work!

Our path to victory in November is strengthened by the support of people like you. The progress we have made so far would not be possible without your help. Thank you for joining us as we work to turn TX-07 red in November and restore conservative values to our district.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=90b6b5139b3e46f7b39715cdec86bc53&_e=zAtCsec_sCogbICrBHA1KAaFxaDVOtBCR-PSxw5dutREpFL5CAlpmsHvdoGK85uE7mn8oIcyCquTO_o4qHfvo-_Ze8s9SOCpKz0As5CTTxEfq1wNiw-c_iI8LNB9OppC-CXa73sb8cvPOorJGS8bixblJixHmLIN-hKzBkPFG76Z-VCXVb7fPAMw2CX0Blfcw87sbk0KCorTMHw86TiZHznV3Sbqlev_e6KzJoXG4mO57Z8jcSyPu1iWDdx7mY7u0t65Z2rsylUCKx2RD0seuBZgkTtHUYu0myVEs6uqMBA%3D)****
